sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36865" key="e(capodi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξᾰποδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hexapody, hexameter,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inRh.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">190.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
